zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Cartwright於1634年10月23日出生在荷蘭藍德米德爾包格時，他的父親John Cartwright35歲，母親Janneke Laureijns30歲。他於1670年與Sarah Elizabeth Miller在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰聖 馬也斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1688年3月18日在美國馬里蘭州聖 馬也斯查阿普迪可享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew Cartwright于1634年10月23日出生在荷兰藍德米德爾包格时，他的父亲John Cartwright35岁，母亲Janneke Laureijns30岁。他于1670年与Sarah Elizabeth Miller在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰聖 馬也斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1688年3月18日在美国马里兰州聖 馬也斯查阿普迪可享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cartwright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Gathright
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cartwright  .

variants.name: Cartright
meanings: Probably also a variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Courtright
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Kortrijk: habitational name from the city of Kortrijk in Flanders, in French known as Courtrai. Compare Cartwright , Cortright , Courtwright , Curtright , Cutright , and Kortright .
Perhaps also an altered form of English   Cartwright  .

History: The progenitors of the (majority of the) Courtrights (and Cortrights, Kortrights, etc.) were the brothers Jan and Michiel Bastiansen van Kortryk from Leerdam in the Netherlands, who arrived with their families to New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1663. The descendants of one or another brother also bear the surnames Kortright, Kortwright, Cortright, Co(u)rtwright, Cartwright, and Cu(r)tright.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1638: St. Mary's, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America *1654: Potomac, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America 1658: St. Mary's, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America 1776: St. Mary's, Maryland, United States *St. Mary's renamed Potomac from 1654-1658
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Cartwright was born on 23 October 1634, in Middelburg, Zeeland, Netherlands, his father, John Cartwright, was 35 and his mother, Janneke Laureijns, was 30. He married Sarah Elizabeth Miller in 1670, in St. Mary's, Maryland, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 March 1688, in Chaptico, St. Mary's, Maryland, United States, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew Cartwright est né le 23 octobre 1634, à Middelburg, Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, John Cartwright, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Janneke Laureijns, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Elizabeth Miller en 1670, à St. Mary's, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1688, à Chaptico, St. Mary's, Maryland, États-Unis, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Cartwrightが1634年10月23日にオランダゼエランドミッドエルブルグで生まれた時，父John Cartwrightは35歳，母Janneke Laureijnsは30歳であった。1670年にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州スト. マリ'スでSarah Elizabeth Millerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1688年3月18日にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州スト. マリ'スチャプティコで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Cartwright(이)가 1634년 10월 23일 네덜란드 제랜드 미델버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cartwright(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Janneke Laureijns(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1670년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 스트. 마이'스에서 Sarah Elizabeth Miller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1688년 3월 18일 미국 메릴랜드 주 스트. 마이'스 차프티코에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Cartwright nasceu em 23 de outubro de 1634, em Middelburg, Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, John Cartwright, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Janneke Laureijns, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Elizabeth Miller em 1670, em St. Mary's, Maryland, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1688, em Chaptico, St. Mary's, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Cartwright родился 23 октября 1634 г. в местности мидделбург, зиланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени John Cartwright было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Janneke Laureijns, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Elizabeth Miller в 1670 г. в местности ст. мэри'с, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 марта 1688 г. в местности чаптику, ст. мэри'с, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 53 лет.
